SNECKO-LOADED_DIE.title: Loaded Die
SNECKO-LUCKY_HORSESHOE.title: Lucky Horseshoe
SNECKO-LUCKY_HORSESHOE.description: Upon pickup, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] Characters. Obtain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Upgraded[/gold] [gold]Uncommon[/gold] cards and [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Rare[/gold] cards. All combats drop an additional card reward of the chosen character's cards.
SNECKO-MYSTICAL_OCTAHEDRON.title: Mystical Octahedron
SNECKO-MYSTICAL_OCTAHEDRON.flavor: It appears weighted toward one side.
SNECKO-RARE_BOOSTER_BOX.title: Rare Booster Box
SNECKO-RARE_BOOSTER_BOX.description: Upon pickup, obtain an [gold]Offclass[/gold] Rare card.
SNECKO-RING_OF_THE_SNEK.title: Ring of the Snek
SNECKO-RING_OF_THE_SNEK.description: Whenever you activate [blue]{Cards}[/blue] [gold]Overflow[/gold] effects, apply [blue]{WeakPower}[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold] and [blue]{VulnerablePower}[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to a random enemy.
SNECKO-SEAL_OF_APPROVAL.title: Seal of Approval
SNECKO-SEAL_OF_APPROVAL.description: Upon pickup, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]5[/blue] Uncommon [gold]Offclass[/gold] Powers to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
SNECKO-SEAL_OF_APPROVAL.flavor: I'm The Ironclad and this is my favorite Relic in the Spire. -Merchant Advertising Pamphlet
SNECKO-SLEEVED_ACE.title: Sleeved Ace
SNECKO-SLEEVED_ACE.description: At the start of each combat, gain a [gold]Marked Card+[/gold].
SNECKO-SNAKE_CHARMERS_FLUTE.title: Snake-Charmer's Flute
SNECKO-SNECKO_SOUL.title: Snecko Soul
SNECKO-SNECKO_SOUL.description: At the start of each combat, add [gold]Soul Roll[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SNECKO-SUPER_SNECKO_SOUL.title: Super Snecko Soul
SNECKO-SUPER_SNECKO_SOUL.description:
At the start of every odd turn, gain a [gold]Soul Roll[/gold].
At the start of every even turn, draw an additional card at the start of your turn and [gold]Muddle[/gold] it.
SNECKO-UNIDENTIFIED_EGG.title: Unidentified Egg
SNECKO-UNIDENTIFIED_EGG.description:
Whenever you add an [gold]Offclass[/gold] card to your [gold]Deck[/gold], [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.
Upon pickup, [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]{Cards}[/blue] random [gold]Offclass[/gold] cards.
SNECKO-UNIDENTIFIED_EGG.flavor: What will hatch? Pay $1000 to see.
